description: This file implements the Bootstrap ScrollSpy component, which tracks scrolling and updates navigation links accordingly. It defines the ScrollSpy class, manages event handlers, and integrates with Bootstrap's utility functions.

classes.name: ScrollSpy
classes.description: A class extending BaseComponent that manages scrollspy behavior, observing sections, updating active links, and handling smooth scrolling.

methods.name: refresh
methods.description: Reinitializes target links and observable sections, and sets up the IntersectionObserver.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Disconnects the observer and performs cleanup.

methods.name: _configAfterMerge
methods.description: Processes and merges configuration options, handling deprecated and backward compatibility options.

methods.name: _maybeEnableSmoothScroll
methods.description: Enables smooth scrolling behavior if configured, attaching click event handlers.

methods.name: _getNewObserver
methods.description: Creates and returns a new IntersectionObserver with current configuration.

methods.name: _observerCallback
methods.description: Callback invoked by IntersectionObserver to update active links based on visible sections.

methods.name: _initializeTargetsAndObservables
methods.description: Finds and stores references to target links and sections to observe.

methods.name: _process
methods.description: Activates a target link and updates UI accordingly.

methods.name: _activateParents
methods.description: Activates parent elements like dropdowns and list items related to the target.

methods.name: _clearActiveClass
methods.description: Removes active classes from parent elements.

methods.name: jQueryInterface
methods.description: Enables jQuery integration for the ScrollSpy component.
